CheckTitle: Security group restricts MongoDB access from the internet
Description: Checks that MongoDB TCP ports 27017 and 27018 are not exposed to unrestricted IPv4 (`0.0.0.0/0`) or IPv6 (`::/0`) sources.
Risk: Public MongoDB access enables unauthorized database discovery, credential attacks, and data theft or destruction.

Code.CLI:
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 27017/27017 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 27017/27017 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 27018/27018 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 27018/27018 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
Code.Other: Restrict MongoDB ingress for both `SourceCidrIp` and `Ipv6SourceCidrIp` to application hosts or trusted CIDRs.

Recommendation.Text: Do not expose TCP ports 27017 or 27018 to `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0`.
